### V. | SYMBOL + GLYPH SYSTEM

Every identity and object will have visual tags and symbolic representations. Preferences needed:

- Emoji (Unicode)
- Custom Glyphs (SVG or hand-drawn)
- ASCII-inspired character systems

These will appear in:
- Notes exports
- GitHub READMEs
- Studio pitch decks
- App UI/UX mapping
